headline: Is Micron Getting Toppy? Not According to These Pros Who See Even More Upside Ahead
summary: Since the new year began, shares of memory juggernaut Micron (NASDAQ:MU) have started to look toppy, with shares falling into two separate corrections (of around 13-15%) in the first quarter. Despite the increased turbulence, though, the stock remains one of the biggest winners on Wall Street of 2026, now up 28% year to date. When ... Is Micron Getting Toppy? Not According to These Pros Who See Even More Upside Ahead

headline: Applied Materials Deepens AI Memory Role With SK Hynix And Micron EPIC Deals
summary: Applied Materials has launched two new collaborations with SK hynix and Micron Technology to co develop next generation DRAM and high bandwidth memory for AI and high performance computing. Both projects will be anchored at Applied's new EPIC Center in Silicon Valley, a US$5 billion R&D facility focused on accelerating advanced memory and packaging technologies. The twin agreements expand Applied's role in the memory supply chain alongside two of the largest global DRAM makers. Applied...
